seo.title: AI Agents on WhatsApp | Catalisa
seo.description: Build your AI agents on WhatsApp in minutes. Connect to your CRM, ERP, and existing systems. Zero code. Enterprise-grade.

hero.headline: Leading retailers already sell via WhatsApp with AI.
hero.headlineGradient: Your company can do the same.
hero.subtitle: Major retailers have already turned conversations into sales channels with 3x more conversion and NPS 90, using specialist agents that search products, compare specs, build carts, and close sales — all within WhatsApp. With Catalisa, you build your own agents in minutes. Connect them to your CRM, ERP, and existing systems — or use our 60+ enterprise Building Blocks. No code, no months of development.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I saw the 55" TV on sale
Hello! Yes, the 55" LG Smart TV is 30% off! From $659 to $461. Want me to reserve it for you?
Deal! Can I pay in installments?
Of course! 12x of $38.48 interest-free. I'll generate your payment link now.

marketValidation.headline: It's not a trend.
marketValidation.subtitle: Major retailers already use teams of specialist agents on WhatsApp with 3x more conversion. Global leaders have validated: composable architecture with AI agents is the path forward. Gartner confirms.

shake-up with GenAI and AI agents by 2026
of support resolved by AI by 2029
frequent users in WhatsApp AI operations

marketValidation.disclaimer: Sources: Gartner (2024-2025), Meta Business, Infobip, Mordor Intelligence, public market cases.

anatomy.headline: What happens
anatomy.subtitle: Each message triggers a chain of intelligent decisions. Just as major retailers use agents that search products, compare specs and close sales — your agents can do the same for any operation.
anatomy.multiModelNote: Different AI models for each task: lightweight for quick responses (< 1s), vision for images (2-3s), and advanced for complex reasoning (3-5s). The platform selects automatically.

chat.text: Hi, I want to know about the enterprise plan
Got it! Before presenting the plans, can I ask a few quick questions about your company?
Sure! We're a fintech with 50 employees
Perfect! For fintechs with up to 100 users, I recommend the Enterprise Plan. Includes full API, SSO and dedicated support. $580/mo.
I like it! How do I sign up?

orchestra.headline: It's not a chatbot.
orchestra.subtitle: The same approach behind the biggest WhatsApp AI success stories: a central orchestrator that selects the right agent for each task — product search, comparison, negotiation, closing. Each agent has its own tools, context and limits. Connected to your existing systems.
orchestra.gartnerNote: Gartner predicts 40% of enterprise apps will have AI agents by 2026. With Catalisa, yours can have them today.
orchestra.whatsappNative: Native carousels, Pix and credit card payments directly in chat, integrated authentication, and a complete journey without leaving WhatsApp.
orchestra.orchestratorDesc: Decides which agent to activate based on detected intent — lightweight model for triage, advanced for complex reasoning

agents.name: Support
agents.desc: Resolves questions and escalates when needed

agents.desc: Generates invoices, negotiates and processes payments

agents.desc: Guides new clients and collects documents

cards.title: Each agent has its role
cards.description: Describe the role, AI builds the profile. Personality, tools and autonomy limits — all configurable. Like a real team, each one knows what to do.

cards.title: Connect your systems
cards.description: Your agents operate your CRM, ERP, calendar, payments and any REST API — not replacing, but empowering what you already have.

cards.title: 60+ Building Blocks
cards.description: WhatsApp, AI, fintech, security, integrations and more. Combine to create any enterprise automation.

cards.title: Enterprise guardrails
cards.description: Autonomy limits, automatic human escalation, complete audit trail and native compliance.

chatMessages.text: I saw your ad on Instagram
Great! How large is your operation today?
50 employees, 3 stores
Perfect! I have an ideal solution. Can I schedule a 15min demo for tomorrow?
My invoice didn't arrive
Found it! Your invoice is due March 15, amount $240. Want me to send a copy now?
Yes, please!
Done! Sent via email and here's the payment link as well.
Hi! I see I have a pending balance
Hi! Yes, there's a $170 balance overdue since Feb 1. Can I offer special terms?
Can I pay in installments?
Sure! 3x of $59 interest-free or pay in full with 10% off ($153). Which do you prefer?
I want to open my account
Great! I need a photo of your ID (front and back) and a selfie. Can you send them now?
[ID Photo]
ID validated! Data extracted: John Smith, SSN ***-**-1234. Now send the selfie.

composablePath.headline: The architecture that market leaders
composablePath.subtitle: From e-commerce to business automation, companies adopting composable architecture with AI achieve results proven by Gartner. Catalisa applies the same principles to business operations + WhatsApp.

examples.achievement: From niche to Gartner Leader in 4 years with composable architecture
$35M+ in Series A for team-based AI agent automation
Enterprise building blocks as market standard (#1 in IT)

gartnerStats: Composable organizations outperform the competition by 80% in feature delivery speed
75% of new apps will be built with low-code/no-code by 2026
Companies with composable AI achieve ROI 6x more frequently

roi.headline: The return
roi.subtitle: Compare: traditional team vs. team with AI agents on WhatsApp. Market cases show NPS 90 with AI agents — above the 85 from traditional channels. Gartner projects companies with AI will save $80B globally by 2026.
